pi_items.source: Web search and multiple authoritative sources (https://www.file-extensions.org/ddp-file-extension-dreamplan-home-design-software-project, https://fileinfo.com/extension/ddp, https://filext.com/file-extension/DDP) confirm that DreamPlan Home Design Software by NCH Software uses .ddp (not .dplan, .dpp, .dpn, or .ndp) as the native project file extension. Additional corroboration from validated_pi.json files of other tasks in this same environment (construct_custom_stone_planter, change_wall_paint_color, change_room_ceiling_height) which explicitly document this error.

pi_items.verified_value: Path structure is reasonable for Windows; filename extension is incorrect (.ddp should be used instead of .dplan). Correct path would be: C:\Users\Docker\Documents\DreamPlan\Carport_Design.ddp
pi_items.source: Windows file system conventions and DreamPlan default save behavior documented in other tasks' setup scripts (create_backyard_patio task.json shows 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\DreamPlan Projects\Sample House.ddp' and add_backyard_gazebo validated_pi.json confirms Documents folder is the default location for DreamPlan projects).

pi_items.verified_value: Path structure is reasonable for Windows; filename extension is incorrect (.ddp should be used instead of .dplan). Correct path would be: C:\Users\Docker\Documents\Carport_Design.ddp
pi_items.source: Same as above - Windows conventions and DreamPlan save behavior documented in related tasks.

File search in task directory benchmarks/cua_world/environments/dreamplan_home_design_software_env/tasks/construct_freestanding_carport/ shows only task.json, verifier.py, and __pycache__. No setup_task.ps1 exists. Other tasks in the same environment (change_flooring_material, renovation_material_package, complete_home_staging, etc.) DO have these scripts, but this task is missing them.

File search in task directory confirms export_result.ps1 does not exist. Required by verifier.py which looks for remote_result_path at 'C:\workspace\tasks\construct_freestanding_carport\task_result.json', which would be created by export_result.ps1 hook. Script is missing.

privileged_info_summary: DreamPlan Home Design Software is developed by NCH Software and is a real commercial application for 3D home design. The task requires constructing a freestanding carport structure using the Post/Column tool for vertical supports and the Roof tool for roofing, in an open-sided design (not enclosed). CRITICAL ISSUE: The metadata specifies saving the project file with extension .dplan (as 'Carport_Design.dplan'), but DreamPlan's native project file format is .ddp, not .dplan. The correct filename should be 'Carport_Design.ddp'. This file extension error is systematic across multiple tasks in this environment and is documented in other tasks' validated_pi.json files (construct_custom_stone_planter, change_room_ceiling_height, change_wall_paint_color, create_backyard_fire_pit). Additionally, the required PowerShell hook scripts (setup_task.ps1 and export_result.ps1) are missing from the task directory, though they exist in other tasks in this environment, which will prevent proper task execution and result verification.
